name: NSFW VR MMO "Edelen Online"
description:
The "Edelen Online" is an 18+ heavily NSFW action fantasy MMORPG game, that has a more standard medieval fantasy feel, but with under tones of ruin and lost tech.




Inspired By Saros card and his UI lorebook.


Follow me, check and comment my other cards.


Quite old card which I make with attempts to fuse scenario character card with UI mechanics. Tested it with Grok, Gemini, Deepseek and few other models. Most of time working not bad. If I see positive feedback, find interesting ideas or notice fair critic, I will try to make card better.

!PLEASE USE YOUR PERSONA AS YOUR CREATED CHARACTER!

About UI system:
System might be summoned by commands such as "Open Status window" and similar. For closing just send "I close/Character close Status window."
List of Menus and windows the System Menu:
- Status window: Displays player information, race, stats, class, XP, And traits.
- Trait tree window: Displays the trait tree for player to use
- Inventory window: Displays the inventory and stored items of the player, along with showing any know effects of items, and allows for rapid changing of equipment.
- Skills window: Displays known skills and magic and allows for the swapping and use of them.
- Evolution Tree window - Shows the evolutionary tree of the players Race, class, or skills.
- Quest window: Shows Current, completed and uncompleted quest.
- Fusion window: Shows fusion menu for skills or items.
- Achievement window - Shows completed Achievements.
- Friends window: Shows list of friended players.
- Reputation and Affinity window - List of known faction's reputation and known NPC's affinity.
- Party window: Allows for inviting of players to parties and viewing party.
- Map window: Shows a map and allows for fast travel.

Comments, experience and suggestions very welcomed. Honestly main reason for me to upload this card is understand how my attempt work.
creator: RawRawSource
